text: The type of power sockets used in Denmark are Type A and Type K. So, you might need an adapter.
The official currency in Denmark is the Danish Krone (DKK). Most places do not accept euros.
You can get a Copenhagen Card that covers 80 attractions and public transports for $30.
The tip rate in Copenhagen is over 50%. So, keep that in mind when dining out.
The weather in Copenhagen in December is below -15 degrees Celsius. So, pack accordingly.
Copenhagen has a total of 6 metro lines. You can reach anywhere in the city by metro.
